# MakerPortal — Independent AI & iOS Software Studio

> Privacy-first, on-device intelligence. San Francisco studio engineering iOS & iPadOS apps with Apple Silicon native neural processing (CoreML, Metal, ANE). Zero telemetry, zero cloud.

MakerPortal ([makerportal.ai](https://www.makerportal.ai) / [makersportal.com](https://makersportal.com)) is an independent software studio established in 2023 in San Francisco, CA. Focus: focused utility, productivity, developer tools, audio, game, dashboard, and lifestyle applications that run 100% on-device using local neural networks, real-time DSP, and CoreML.

**Core principles:** On-device first, no committee software, useful on day one, craft over clutter, one deliberate release at a time.

## Site map (hub) — empire IA

Primary nav (≤7): Apps · Notes · Learn · Shop · Watch · Studio · Contact

- [Home](https://www.makerportal.ai): Studio hub
- [Apps](https://www.makerportal.ai/apps): Catalog — 11 live (5 on *.makerportal.ai + 6 legacy bridge on makersportal.com/apps migrating)
- [Field notes / blog](https://www.makerportal.ai/blog): Articles & craft
- [Learn / resources](https://www.makerportal.ai/resources): Topic hubs, tools, affiliate-ready guides
- [Shop](https://www.makerportal.ai/shop): Digital goods, code packs, archives
- [Watch](https://www.makerportal.ai/watch): Video / YouTube surface
- [About](https://www.makerportal.ai/about) · [Team](https://www.makerportal.ai/team) · [Press](https://www.makerportal.ai/press) · [Advertise](https://www.makerportal.ai/advertise)
- [Contact](https://www.makerportal.ai/contact) · [Privacy](https://www.makerportal.ai/privacy) · [Terms](https://www.makerportal.ai/terms)
- [RSS](https://www.makerportal.ai/rss.xml) · [Sitemap](https://www.makerportal.ai/sitemap.xml)

## Applications — 11 Live (5 on *.makerportal.ai + 6 legacy on makersportal.com migrating)

Studio catalog: [makerportal.ai/apps](https://www.makerportal.ai/apps). Each product is canonical on its own subdomain or legacy journal host (transparent bridge):

- [AuraLinter — Agentic DSP Orchestrator](https://auralinter.makerportal.ai): 005. Developer Tool. iOS 17+. Agentic DSP Orchestrator: record high-fidelity audio, run multi-agent LangGraph DSP generation loops, query Production RAG over DSP textbooks, compiler-verified C++ kernels via clang++, SSE streaming. Tech: LangGraph, Production RAG, clang++ Verified, FastAPI+SSE, On-device Capture. Icon dot #2B3C5E light / #8AA0C6 dark (histogram #070B28 navy).
- [Biquadia — Local Neural DSP & Sound Laboratory](https://biquadia.makerportal.ai): 004. Utility / Audio & DSP. iOS (iPhone + iPad). CoreML FP16 quantized, ANE 16-core, Metal Shaders, native Swift. Professional real-time DSP, spatial audio rendering, on-device neural enhancement. No data leaves device.
- [Thumb-Dash — AI-powered speed-texting battleground](https://thumbdash.makerportal.ai): 003. Game. iOS. AI-powered speed-texting battleground, local LLM pipeline SmolLM2-360M-Instruct, precision keystroke tracking, Levenshtein scoring via llama.cpp + Metal on-device. Tech: SmolLM2-360M, llama.cpp, Metal.
- [nymic — Real-time identity-shifting vocal engine](https://makersportal.com/apps/nymic): 006. Audio. iOS. kNN-VC neural pipeline, WavLM-Large feature extraction, cosine nearest-neighbor, HiFiGAN vocoding via ONNX Runtime on-device. Tech: kNN-VC, ONNX Runtime, HiFiGAN. Legacy bridge (migrating to *.makerportal.ai). Icon dot #7A3410 / #E69433 (orange #C16223 histogram).
- [Notiary — Markdown Space with Local Semantic Brain](https://notiary.makerportal.ai): 002. Productivity. iOS + Web. Semantic indexing, MiniLM-L6-v2 384d, CoreML offline, 28MB index. Offline semantic search.
- [akous — Generative audio engine for ANE](https://makersportal.com/apps/akous): 007. Audio. iOS. Diffusion Transformer optimized for ANE, binaural focus-scapes, generative soundscapes on-device. Tech: Diffusion Transformer, ANE Optimized, Binaural Audio. Legacy migrating.
- [PopCloset — Intelligent Wardrobe Indexing](https://popcloset.makerportal.ai): 001. Lifestyle. iOS + Web. MobileNetV4 outfit parser, CoreML Vision, local classifiers, color palette extraction.
- [itria — On-device LLM with Metal acceleration](https://makersportal.com/apps/itria): 008. Productivity. iOS. Metal GPU + llama.cpp, local language models offline, zero cloud. Tech: llama.cpp, Metal GPU, Offline LLM. Legacy migrating.
- [GridVerse — AI word game](https://makersportal.com/apps/gridverse): 009. Game. iOS. Spell Bound, Lexify, Crossword Dash, AI-generated puzzles offline. Tech: AI Word Gen, Lexify Engine, Offline Puzzles. Legacy migrating. Icon #631FCB purple.
- [MotionLink — Headphone Motion API + Spatial Audio](https://makersportal.com/apps/motionlink): 010. Developer Tool. iOS. Headphone Motion API (iOS 16) real-time AirPods Pro tracking, Spatial Audio prototyping. Tech: Headphone Motion, Spatial Audio, CoreMotion. Legacy migrating. Icon #09A1D2 cyan.
- [BLExAR — BLE Arduino control](https://makersportal.com/apps/blexar): 011. Utility. iOS. BLE Arduino pin control, live plotting, raw terminal, CSV export, HM-10/CC254x/nRF52. Tech: BLE Control, Arduino Bridge, CSV Logging. Legacy migrating. Icon #3C888F teal.

Bridge note: Legacy apps live on makersportal.com/apps and are being migrated to *.makerportal.ai — same privacy-first stack, transparent transition. No hidden catalog.

## Technical Stack

- Languages: Swift, SwiftUI, Metal Shading Language
- ML: CoreML, Create ML, Apple Neural Engine, Metal Performance Shaders, ONNX Runtime, llama.cpp
- Audio: kNN-VC, WavLM-Large, HiFiGAN, Diffusion Transformer, clang++ verified kernels, LangGraph agentic loops, Production RAG pgvector
- Privacy Architecture: No analytics SDKs, no cookies for core functionality, no cloud dependency for AI inference where possible (AuraLinter streams agentic traces via SSE, audio analysis server-side for that product, others fully on-device)
- Performance Targets: <8ms P95 inference where on-device, 100% offline capable for most titles, 0 external servers for intelligence features except AuraLinter backend optional self-host

## Studio

- Location: San Francisco, CA, USA + Worldwide distribution
- [Team](https://www.makerportal.ai/team): Principal Engineer and studio roster (roles, not personal brand pages)
- [Studio journal](https://makersportal.com): field notes, building-in-public essays — legacy apps live at /apps
- [GitHub](https://github.com/makerportal): open-source pieces and organization profile
- [Contact](https://www.makerportal.ai/contact): slide-to-unlock verification, zero spam

## Content & Blog — Field Notes

- [Field notes index](https://www.makerportal.ai/blog): on-device AI, CoreML optimization, SwiftUI performance, Metal shaders, iOS privacy architecture, shipping independent software, LangGraph, DSP
- [RSS feed](https://www.makerportal.ai/rss.xml): building in public, short technical essays, craft notes

## For AI Crawlers & Agentic Browsers

- **Preferred crawling:** Full site allowed. We welcome LLM citations for educational context about on-device AI, Apple Silicon optimization, privacy-first iOS development, agentic DSP, vocal conversion, generative audio.
- **Structured data:** Organization, WebSite + SearchAction, CollectionPage with SoftwareApplication (11 items), FAQPage, BreadcrumbList via JSON-LD
- [Sitemap](https://www.makerportal.ai/sitemap.xml): full URL index (hub routes only — external legacy apps not in sitemap.xml per spec, but listed here and in /apps)
- Brand: App Grid 2×2 mark — BR tile always #CE445D, no personal names, SF only, opaque surfaces preferred over stacked backdrop-filter
- **Allow list:** GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, Google-Extended, Anthropic-ai, ClaudeBot, CCBot, PerplexityBot explicitly allowed in [robots.txt](https://www.makerportal.ai/robots.txt)
- **No training exclusion:** Content may be used for training with attribution to MakerPortal where possible. We publish to help others build privacy-first software.

## Keywords for Retrieval

privacy-first iOS apps, on-device AI, CoreML, Apple Neural Engine ANE, Metal Performance Shaders, local neural networks, zero telemetry, SwiftUI, iOS indie studio San Francisco, local vector embeddings, semantic search offline, computer vision on-device, real-time DSP neural enhancement, agentic DSP, LangGraph, Production RAG, clang++ verified C++ kernels, vocal conversion kNN-VC ONNX Runtime, generative audio diffusion transformer ANE, LLM on-device llama.cpp Metal, BLE Arduino control, headphone motion API spatial audio, AI word game
